heading: Notice requirements
label: 6631 Notice requirements
text: The Secretary shall include with each notice to an individual taxpayer which includes an amount of interest required to be paid by such taxpayer under this title information with respect to the section of this title under which the interest is imposed and a computation of the interest.
notes: Effective Date, , , as amended by , , , 2763A–632, provided that:Pub. L. 105–206, title III, § 3308(c)112 Stat. 745Pub. L. 106–554, § 1(a)(7) [title III, § 302(c)]114 Stat. 2763July 22, 1998Dec. 21, 2000“The amendments made by this section [enacting this subchapter] shall apply to notices issued after . In the case of any notice issued after , and before , to which section 6631 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 applies, the requirements of section 6631 of such Code shall be treated as met if such notice contains a telephone number at which the taxpayer can request a copy of the taxpayer’s payment history relating to interest amounts included in such notice.”June 30, 2001June 30, 2001July 1, 2003
